Header.tagline: vol. 03 · quiet corner of the web

Footer.colophon: Set in Fraunces, Newsreader & JetBrains Mono. The text is the work; the design is the chrome.

Home.title: A wiki, set
Home.intro: Working notes on interaction-era AI, kept publicly. Each plate is a topic; each topic carries its brightest notes and the source I'm currently digesting. {total} notes across {sourceCount} sources{lastFiled}. Updated whenever a batch finishes — not on a schedule.

Articles.title: Articles
Articles.zhDescription: 由 AI 從英文原文翻譯的文章。
Articles.zhIntro: 以下文章由 AI 從英文原文翻譯，內容會隨原文更新而重新翻譯。

ArticlePage.aboutBody: Articles in this journal are synthesised by AI agents from a curated wiki and are refreshed automatically as new concepts arrive. Topics, framing, and editorial direction are curated by Howardism.
